---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Who is affected and how often?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you've thought about and why you prefer your proposed solution.

## Additional Context

Mockups, screenshots, or references to similar features in other apps.
